plugins.name: ruff-hooks
plugins.description: Runs ruff check and format on Python files after every Write, Edit, or MultiEdit

plugins.name: catline-status
plugins.description: Claude Code statusline with model, git branch, context, and cat animations

plugins.description: Academic research assistant powered by Semantic Scholar

plugins.name: plugin-critic
plugins.description: Reviews Claude Code plugin PRs using rubric-driven evaluation with expectation-grounded assessment across five quality dimensions.

plugins.name: paper-reading-guide
plugins.description: Turn a paper (arXiv/DOI/PMC/URL/PDF) into a structured reading guide — obtain the full text, render its figure pages, read it in full, and map where everything is and what's worth taking.
